a260708p1.summary: Nvidia has a plan to deal with the growing list of AI server chip competitors: partner with them. — In the latest example …
a260708p1.title: Nvidia and AI chip startup d-Matrix are combining their hardware in a new system to power AI models, the latest example of Nvidia partnering with rivals (Phoebe Liu/The Information)

a260708p10.summary: Chip startup SambaNova Systems Inc. has raised $1 billion at an $11 billion valuation, underscoring investors' conviction …
a260708p10.title: Chip startup SambaNova raised a $1B Series F led by General Atlantic at an $11B valuation and signs JPMorgan as a customer to deploy its chips for in-house AI (Bloomberg)

a260708p11.summary: Apple (AAPL.O) lost its challenge on Wednesday against landmark EU rules that designate its app stores and operating system iOS …
a260708p11.title: The EU General Court dismisses Apple's legal challenges against its designation as a DMA "gatekeeper" for its App Store and iOS; Apple filed the case in 2024 (Foo Yun Chee/Reuters)

a260708p2.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's hardware ambitions are edging into a new privacy fight over who gets recorded. Meta is testing a prototype of …
a260708p2.title: Sources: Meta is testing AI glasses that continuously record audio and take photos every few seconds, letting users query or recall what they saw or heard (Hannah Murphy/Financial Times)

a260708p24.summary: ZDNET's key takeaways — Entire launched a decentralized Git network built for agents. — The company plans to open-source its backend.
a260708p24.title: Former GitHub CEO Thomas Dohmke's Entire launches a decentralized Git network to handle high coding agent traffic, with servers in the US, the EU, and Australia (Radhika Rajkumar/ZDNET)

a260708p25.summary: Kaon AI, a start-up focused on building personalized story worlds powered by generative AI for its users through its products FlowGPT and Emochi …
a260708p25.title: Kaon AI, which builds personalized story worlds using its AI-based FlowGPT and Emochi tools, raised $60M from B Capital and others, and says Emochi has 2M DAUs (Corbin Bolies/Variety)

a260708p26.summary: The OpenAI Deployment Company agreed to acquire Northslope, an applied AI firm, OpenAI shared exclusively with Axios …
a260708p26.title: The OpenAI Deployment Company agrees to acquire Northslope, an applied AI company founded by ex-Palantir employees, its second acquisition after buying Tomoro (Madison Mills/Axios)

a260708p27.summary: After losing roughly $1 trillion in market value in less than two months, Nvidia Corp.'s stock is the cheapest it's been since …
a260708p27.title: Nvidia lost ~$1T in market value in less than two months, dropping 16% from its May all-time-high, trading at 18x forward earnings, its lowest level since 2019 (Bloomberg)

a260708p28.summary: Paradigm, the venture firm founded to invest in cryptocurrency companies, has raised a new $1.2 billion fund to make more bets outside …
a260708p28.title: Crypto VC firm Paradigm raised $1.2B, its fourth fund, to invest in areas outside of crypto, like AI and robotics; Paradigm had $11.9B in AUM at the end of 2025 (Rebecca Torrence/Bloomberg)

a260708p29.summary: Mistral AI announced a new robotics navigation model, as the French startup expands in the emerging field of physical artificial intelligence …
a260708p29.title: Mistral launches Robostral Navigate, a hardware-agnostic robotics navigation model trained via simulation that uses a single camera and basic language prompts (Benoit Berthelot/Bloomberg)

a260708p3.summary: Paris-based Skello, an AI-powered HR management solution for frontline teams, announces a €200 million investment in order …
a260708p3.title: Paris-based Skello, which provides AI-powered HR tools for frontline workforce management, raised €200M led by Bridgepoint to support its European expansion (David Cendon Garcia/EU-Startups)

a260708p30.summary: China plans to allow some of the country's biggest AI companies to buy a small number of Nvidia's H200 chips, according to two people with direct knowledge of the matter.
a260708p30.title: Sources: China plans to let some of its biggest AI companies buy a small number of Nvidia's H200 chips to offset a domestic computing shortage in recent months (Qianer Liu/The Information)

a260708p31.summary: Momenta's subdued start belied its strong investor demand — General Motors-backed Momenta's Hong Kong initial public offering …
a260708p31.title: GM-backed Chinese autonomous driving company Momenta saw a muted trading debut in its Hong Kong IPO, up 2.8% to value the company at ~$9B, after raising $751M (Jiahui Huang/Wall Street Journal)

a260708p32.summary: The AI agent platform founded by monday.com alumni has reached $15 million in new revenue run rate after 800% revenue growth.
a260708p32.title: Israeli startup Alta, which develops an AI agent platform for marketing, sales, and business development teams, raised a $25M Series A led by IN Venture (Meir Orbach/CTech)

a260708p33.summary: China's Nexchip Semiconductor (688249.SS) said on Wednesday it aims to raise around HK$6.98 billion ($890.37 million) …
a260708p33.title: China's Nexchip Semiconductor says it aims to raise around $890.37M in its Hong Kong share sale by offering 216.2M shares at ~$4.12/share, the top of its range (Rajasik Mukherjee/Reuters)

a260708p34.summary: You know how we say we love the unsexy side of defense? Well, we're back with some news from the unsexiest place we can imagine …
a260708p34.title: Arkenstone Defense, which is building software to handle back-office work for defense tech startups, emerges from stealth with a $35M seed led by J2 Ventures (Barratt Dewey/Tectonic Defense)

a260708p35.summary: Prime Intellect, a startup that provides computing power and specialized software tools that help companies build AI agents …
a260708p35.title: Prime Intellect, which helps companies build their own AI agents by offering computing power and specialized tools, raised a $130M Series A at a $1B valuation (Marina Temkin/TechCrunch)

a260708p36.summary: A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice. — Sign up to be notified
a260708p36.title: OpenAI launches GPT-Live, a new generation of voice models built on a full-duplex architecture, meaning they can listen and speak at the same time (OpenAI)

a260708p37.summary: While native device assistants have long left users wanting more, OpenAI's voice models have quietly been getting closer and closer to the assistants we've always been promised.
a260708p37.title: OpenAI rolls out two versions of GPT-Live: GPT-Live-1, powering ChatGPT Voice for Go, Plus, and Pro users, and GPT-Live-1 mini, the default for free users (Sabrina Ortiz/The Deep View)

a260708p38.summary: SpaceXAI has unveiled a new artificial intelligence model built in partnership with AI coding startup Cursor that's meant …
a260708p38.title: SpaceXAI launches Grok 4.5, its first model built in partnership with Cursor, designed to "handle difficult, long-running" legal, finance, and coding tasks (Carmen Arroyo/Bloomberg)

a260708p39.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceXAI is launching Grok 4.5, its smartest model yet, and its first release since going public and acquiring the AI coding startup Cursor.
a260708p39.title: Grok 4.5 is available in Grok Build, in Cursor, and from the SpaceXAI console, but not in the EU; it costs $2 per 1M input tokens and $6 per 1M output tokens (Axios)

a260708p4.summary: Robots on the factory floor. Self-driving vehicles on the Las Vegas strip. Even a substitute for man's best friend — the robotic dog.
a260708p4.title: A look at Chinese lidar maker Hesai, blacklisted by the US DOD in 2024, as it expands in the US; Hesai says it has ~33% of the global automotive lidar market (CNBC)

a260708p40.summary: Meta's AI expansion is heading north of the border. — The company said in a blog post on Wednesday that it's building its first data center …
a260708p40.title: Meta announces its first data center in Canada, a 1GW facility in Alberta that will cost the company about $9B and take two to three years to construct (Jonathan Vanian/CNBC)

a260708p41.summary: Through a detailed audit, we find widespread task issues in SWE-Bench Pro and estimate that ~30% of the tasks are broken.
a260708p41.title: OpenAI says it found widespread task issues in SWE-Bench Pro, estimates ~30% of tasks are broken, and retracts its earlier recommendation to adopt the benchmark (OpenAI)

a260708p5.summary: Oratomic raised a $300 million Series A to accelerate development of fault-tolerant, utility-scale quantum computers.
a260708p5.title: Oratomic, which is developing quantum computing hardware and software, raised a $300M Series A led by ARCH Venture Partners, Spark Capital, and Khosla Ventures (Matt Swayne/The Quantum Insider)

a260708p6.summary: TAIPEI/PALO ALTO, California — The global AI boom is reshaping one of the semiconductor industry's most important battlegrounds: CPUs.
a260708p6.title: The global AI boom has thrust CPUs back into the spotlight as Nvidia, Qualcomm, MediaTek, and others challenge Intel and AMD in the AI data center CPU market (Nikkei Asia)

a260708p7.summary: Pushback to the tech group's politics may threaten the core of its $330bn business. The week after a US immigration enforcement officer killed …
a260708p7.title: Palantir insiders and investors fear the company's enthusiastic embrace of President Trump's policies could drive away corporate clients and engineering talent (Financial Times)

a260708p8.summary: Out of the spotlight, the movement has been preparing for the soon-to-be AI rich to donate billions.
a260708p8.title: A look at effective altruism's fall after SBF's arrest and how the soon-to-be rich from upcoming AI IPOs give the movement a chance to return larger than ever (Andrew Fedorov/New York Magazine)

a260708p9.summary: U.S. lawmakers are considering how to curb the growing adoption of Chinese AI models by homegrown companies …
a260708p9.title: US lawmakers are considering strategies to curb US companies' growing adoption of Chinese AI models, as a House committee investigation investigates the risks (Kai Nicol-Schwarz/CNBC)
